info.title: UNCFileCopy
info.description: This tool allows a file to be copied to a UNC network share. It allows the use of impersonation to perform this copy with other credentials.

options.name: --destination-unc-directory
options.description: The UNC path to the destination directory.

options.name: --destination-file-name
options.description: The file name for the destination, including extension.

options.name: --add-timestamp-suffix
options.description: If true, adds a timestamp suffix (yyyyMMddHHmmss) to the destination filename. [default: False]
